title.en: Studio Condo for sale at Life Ladprao

summary.zh: 出售：0卧，29㎡，5,155,555 泰铢。来源 DotProperty #fd9566a1c8ec-104f-ec92-da50-10f9a089。
summary.th: ขาย: 0 นอน 29 ตร.ม. ราคา 5,155,555 บาท (DotProperty #fd9566a1c8ec-104f-ec92-da50-10f9a089)

description.en: This property is a 29 SqM studio condo with 1 bathroom that is available for sale. It is part of the Life Ladprao project in Chomphon, Bangkok and was completed in May 2020. You can buy this condo for a base price of ฿5,155,555 (฿177,778/SqM) and it is also available for long term rentals starting from ฿20,000 per month.

description.en:
PropertyScout ID [hidden phone]


Fully furnished 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom condo for sale with a floorsize of 35 squaremeters, located on the 17th floor, at Life
Ladprao building, in the popular Chatuchak district near BTS Ha Yaek Lat Phrao and near MRT Phahon Yothin. Please contact us to
schedule a viewing.

Unit amenities:
 * Balcony
 * Microwave
 * Refrigerator
 * Stove
 * TV

Building features:
 * Building completed in 2020
 * Security cameras
 * Gym
 * 24-hours security
 * Relaxing swimming pool
 * Steam room
